change: Created CLAUDE.md to lock wiki scope to The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints official materials and codify official terminology (no LDS/Mormon shorthand, Elder/President titles, standard works names). Also normalized LDS terminology in existing pages: wiki/people/gerrit-gong.md, wiki/concepts/covenant-belonging.md, wiki/index.md.

note: User-provided text (General Handbook §38.8.48). Saved as type:note rather than article since source was not fetched from a URL.
Korean variant of newsroom URL (?lang=kor) returned identical English content (translation not yet available). Not saved as separate source; will note in CLAUDE.md update.

change: Added [[deepfakes]] and [[divine-learning-pattern]] to wiki/index.md; updated church-ai-guiding-principles description to 7-원칙/4-영역.

Updated CLAUDE.md with §6 Ingest 운영 학습 (실전 적용) — 7 sub-sections covering: user-provided text handling, multilingual variant URLs, prose handling for people without wiki pages, source-citation positional annotations, multi-stage series tables, second-hand citations between Apostles, published-date extraction. Also strengthened Seventy 호칭 (Elder X of the Seventy 첫 언급 시 의무) and added 공식 문서 인용 형식 (General Handbook, FSOY, Liahona/Ensign, General Conference).

Added CLAUDE.md §7 (Sensitivity + Copyright guardrails), §8 (Citation source hierarchy: primary > secondary > tertiary), §9 (Body language policy: Korean prose + English key terms, original-language quotes), §10 (Lint automation commands for terminology violations, broken wikilinks, orphan pages, citation-missing heuristics), §11 (Apostle quorum change update procedure). Renumbered prior §7 우선순위 → §12 and §8 참고 → §13.

Added CLAUDE.md §6.8 (SCHEMA.md 로드 의무) to make explicit that SCHEMA.md must be Read at start of each wiki skill invocation, since unlike CLAUDE.md it is not auto-loaded by Claude Code. Documents re-read triggers (after schema edit, after context compaction, first wiki op in session) and explicitly chooses NOT to embed SCHEMA contents in CLAUDE.md to avoid sync drift. Renumbered §6.8 → §6.9.

conflict_surfaced: Handbook section number: user-provided text uses §38.8.48; Newsroom (2025-12-16) uses §38.8.47. CONFLICT marker added to wiki/concepts/church-ai-guiding-principles.md.

change: Applied user feedback God → 하나님 (memory: feedback_lds_translation_god) across wiki/index.md, wiki/people/gerrit-gong.md, wiki/concepts/{church-ai-guiding-principles,covenant-belonging,moral-agency,agi}.md, wiki/topics/ai-and-faith.md. CLAUDE.md §2 핵심 교의 용어 표 updated with deity terminology (God/Heavenly Father/Lord/Savior/Redeemer/Divine etc).

Applied user feedback moral agency → 도덕적 선택의지 (memory: feedback_lds_translation_moral_agency) across wiki/concepts/{moral-agency,covenant-belonging}.md and CLAUDE.md §2 / §9.2. Memory MEMORY.md index updated.
